basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Assistant Professor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD degree in Chemical Engineering or allied areas, with a first class in the preceding degree and a consistently strong academic record throughout. Candidates with background in Data-Analytics are encouraged to apply.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Grade-I/ Grade-II): PhD degree, compulsory in Chemical Engineering or allied areas, with a first class in the preceding degree and a consistently strong academic record throughout. Bachelor's and PhD degree in Chemical Engineering Background in Data-Analytics encouraged

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor (Grade-I): Pay Level 12, Basic Pay Range Rs. 84,700/- to Rs.1,01,500/-. Minimum 3 years of teaching/research/industrial experience (not inclusive of experience during PhD). Assistant Professor (Grade-II): Pay Level 10/11. Not a regular cadre. Fresh PhD or without adequate experience are eligible on contract basis (typically 3 years duration).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Mandi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Mandi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Mandi Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Assistant Professor positions at IIT Mandi is 03-07-2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a PhD degree in Chemical Engineering or allied areas, with a first-class in their preceding degree and a strong academic record. A background in Data-Analytics is also encouraged.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: Yes, the preferred age limit for Assistant Professor positions is preferably below 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Professor roles?
faq.answer: The salary is offered at Pay Level 10/11 for Grade-II (contract) and Pay Level 12 for Grade-I (with 3 years of experience), ranging from Rs. 84,700/- to Rs.1,01,500/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Mandi Assistant Professor jobs?
faq.answer: You need to apply online through the official website of IIT Mandi. The application link and further instructions are provided in the article.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates are required to fill and submit their applications through the designated online portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Assistant Professor positions is on a contract basis, typically for a duration of 3 years.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Mandi offer any relaxation in age for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While the preferred age limit is below 35 years, specific age relaxation details for reserved categories are usually mentioned in the detailed official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Professor positions at IIT Mandi will involve a Presentation and an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
